name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 15% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw you cancelled recently, and that's completely okay — no guilt, no sales pitch. We started Bright Smile to make dental care feel less scary, and that mission doesn't come with fine print.

If it ever feels like the right time to come back for a cleaning or a free new-patient consultation, here's 15% off on us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days at checkout.

And if something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely like to hear it — just hit reply. A real person on our team reads every message.

Take care either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick heads up that your 15% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it if it's helpful, ignore if not. Take care!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
